kw.name: Execute
Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: Running command 'ozone freon ockv -t 1 -n1 -p ockgpre 2>&1'.

${output} = 2026-06-09 13:14:33 INFO BaseFreonGenerator:317 - Executing test with prefix ockgpre and number-of-tests 1 2026-06-09 13:14:33 INFO ProgressBar:167 - Progress: 0.00 % (0 out of 1) 2026-06-09 13:14:3...

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
kw.msg: Argument types are: <class 'int'> <class 'str'>
Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

${result} = 2026-06-09 13:14:33 INFO BaseFreonGenerator:317 - Executing test with prefix ockgpre and number-of-tests 1 2026-06-09 13:14:33 INFO ProgressBar:167 - Progress: 0.00 % (0 out of 1) 2026-06-09 13:14:3...

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Execute
Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: Running command 'ozone freon ockv -t 1 -n1 -p ockgpost 2>&1'.

${output} = 2026-06-09 13:14:58 INFO BaseFreonGenerator:317 - Executing test with prefix ockgpost and number-of-tests 1 2026-06-09 13:14:58 INFO ProgressBar:167 - Progress: 0.00 % (0 out of 1) 2026-06-09 13:14:...
